title: Canhıraş — Autonomous UAV
blurb: A twin-engine fixed-wing UAV designed, wired and flown from scratch for Teknofest — airframe CAD, avionics, an onboard vision computer and a full ground station, all solo.

title: İşte Bu Parça!
blurb: A robot yells at you, you sort colour-coded junk into the right machines against the clock. Built solo in 72 hours — took 2nd place at Mağara Jam '23.

title: Vines Of Fate
blurb: Climb the glowing vine of your destiny in first person. A 48-hour Global Game Jam build — I coded it, made the sound, and did the narrator's voice.

title: Tribus
blurb: A lonely 3D kid platforms across a flat 2D town to bring a girl a rose. Melancholy jam game, 5th place at Mağara Jam 3.

title: Life is Colorful
blurb: Save your father, commit light crimes, try not to become a demon. A moral-balance RPG with 100% hand-drawn art.

title: Hayali Bahçe
blurb: "Imaginary Garden" — a small game I keep meaning to write up properly.

title: The Universe Platform — Engine & Editor
blurb: One of five core engineers on a UGC game platform built from scratch. Sole author of the voxel engine, the in-app editor framework and the asset pipeline.

title: INTERGALACTICORP.
blurb: Satirical space-corporation game shipped on Steam with an 8,000+ wishlist launch — built by the studio I co-founded, Nuke The Boss.

title: Build The Earth — Türkiye
blurb: Founded the Turkish branch of the project recreating Earth 1:1 in Minecraft; admin of the 150,000+ member global community.

title: Grizzly Bear — Smart Home
blurb: NodeMCU-based smart home system — hardware, firmware and web dashboard built solo and deployed across 10+ buildings.

title: Atilla — AI Assistant
blurb: AI personal assistant & smart-home controller — the project that kicked off the whole FabaluSoftware rabbit hole.

title: Sports & the Outdoors
blurb: The sports I throw myself at and the trails I walk — with more enthusiasm than technique. Stories (and a few injuries) coming soon.

title: Camp Journeys
blurb: Field notes from tents, campfires and slightly-off navigation across the map. Write-ups coming soon.
